title: calanthe subtriloba
intro: Calanthe subtriloba, also known as the Calanthe orchid or Sub-trilobed Calanthe, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family and is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calanthe subtriloba include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as promoting wound healing and improving digestion. Calanthe subtriloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
